description: Create a statistical infographic in Wondershare EdrawMax titled 'Remote Work Impact 2024' that visualizes survey data regarding productivity changes: 45% Increased, 35% No Change, and 20% Decreased. The infographic must include the key insight text 'Flexibility is the top driver of productivity' and a relevant icon (such as a computer, home, or person). Save the editable file to /home/ga/Diagrams/remote_work_infographic.eddx and export the final infographic as an image to /home/ga/Diagrams/remote_work_infographic.png.
